overview: Migrate the vote notification Discord message format from the legacy bot to ../GMGameBot while preserving existing site integration and reward flow. Keep API compatibility for current payloads and add monitoring propagation from site backend when available.
goals: Reproduce legacy vote notification style in new bot send_embed route
Maintain payload compatibility for existing callers
Ensure graceful handling for missing monitoring and empty username
nonGoals: Do not migrate or reimplement legacy RCON reward issuance logic
Do not migrate or reimplement random win/prize logic from legacy bot
Do not modify production configs, secrets, or deployment environment
successMetrics: After vote flow completion, Discord receives message in legacy style through ../GMGameBot
POST /send_embed accepts existing payload shape without runtime errors
Site reward application and balance update behavior remains unchanged
openQuestions: None blocking based on current requirements; legacy button labels and URLs must be copied 1:1 from legacy route

stack.framework: Existing Node.js/TypeScript backend + Node.js bot service
stack.database: Existing project database (unchanged for this feature)
stack.auth: Existing internal service API usage between site backend and bot API (no auth model changes)

routes.name: Site Vote Handler
routes.purpose: Accept vote callback and trigger reward + bot notification flow

routes.name: Bot Embed Sender
routes.purpose: Receive vote payload and post formatted Discord notification

uiNotes: Discord message content (embed title/description/buttons/text) must match legacy old-bot format exactly
When monitoring is missing, message text must use fallback phrase 'на одном из мониторингов'
When username is missing/empty in bot payload, display name fallback must be 'Игрок'

importFormat.description: Not applicable for external file import. Internal JSON payload from site backend to bot API.

rules: POST /send_embed must support payload with username only (current caller contract)
POST /send_embed must not require monitoring; if absent, use text fallback 'на одном из мониторингов'
Bot route supports username as canonical name source; if empty or whitespace-only, use fallback 'Игрок'
Legacy embed/button/text structure must be ported to new bot route without introducing reward/RCON/random logic
Site backend should pass monitoring to send_embed when available in vote handler context
Any backend changes must not alter existing reward issuance and balance update behavior

stories.title: Port legacy Discord vote embed format into new bot send route
stories.description: As a community member, I want vote notifications in Discord to keep the familiar rich format so announcements remain recognizable and actionable.
acceptanceCriteria: In ../GMGameBot POST /send_embed, replace current embed/button content with legacy format from old Discord_helper/routes/vote_handler.js including title, description, text and button set
Button labels and URLs are copied from legacy implementation 1:1
Example: payload { "username": "Player123", "monitoring": "topcraft" } posts a Discord message matching legacy style and includes monitoring-specific wording
Negative case: payload with missing monitoring still posts successfully and uses fallback phrase 'на одном из мониторингов' instead of blank or malformed text
No RCON, random reward, or prize issuance logic from legacy file is introduced in new bot route

stories.title: Keep send_embed payload compatibility and add username guard
stories.description: As an integrator, I want send_embed to remain compatible with existing caller payloads so current site requests continue to work without regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /send_embed continues accepting payload with field username only
Input normalization for username is added: empty string, null, undefined, or whitespace resolves to fallback 'Игрок'
Example: payload { "username": "Player123" } posts message successfully with player name 'Player123'
Negative case: payload { "username": "   " } does not crash and posts message with name 'Игрок'
Route returns non-error response for compatible old payload shape used by site backend

stories.title: Propagate monitoring from site vote flow to bot API
stories.description: As a backend maintainer, I want monitoring to be passed to send_embed when available so Discord notifications can reference source monitoring accurately.
acceptanceCriteria: In gmgame-site-backend vote flow, update send_embed request payload to include monitoring when available in vote handler context
Existing reward application and balance update logic remains behaviorally unchanged
Example: vote handler context with username='Player123' and monitoring='topcraft' results in bot API payload containing both username and monitoring
Negative case: when monitoring is absent, backend still sends valid payload and reward flow completes without errors
No production config/secret changes are made

stories.title: Add automated tests for compatibility scenarios
stories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests in gmgame-site-backend to cover payload compatibility scenarios so regressions are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update unit tests in gmgame-site-backend for: payload only with username; payload including user + monitoring context mapping to outgoing payload; absence of monitoring
Tests assert outgoing bot payload and that reward-related code path is not broken by monitoring propagation changes
Example: test case with username-only input verifies send_embed call still occurs with backward-compatible payload and reward processing path
Negative case: test case with missing monitoring verifies fallback/optional behavior and no thrown error
Project passes quality gates: npm test, npm run lint, npm run build
